observation: I can see two overlapping lists displayed on the screen - a language selection dropdown on the left side and a country/region selection interface. The country list shows many countries with flags and names like Afghanistan, Aland Islands, Albania, etc. There's also a 'Sign up now' button visible at the bottom. The interface appears to be showing both a country selection modal and a language selection modal simultaneously, which seems confusing. I need to close one of these modals to proceed with the sign-up flow.
reasoning: As an elderly user, I find this interface confusing with multiple overlapping selection lists. I need to close the language selection modal first to focus on selecting my country. I can see a close button (X icon) in the top right area that should close one of these modals.
ux_issues: Multiple overlapping modal dialogs create confusion
No clear indication which modal is active
Small close button may be difficult for elderly users to see

outcome.visual_observation: The country/region selection modal was closed successfully. The colored boxes/indicators that were visible next to each country in the BEFORE screenshot are no longer present in the AFTER screenshot, showing a cleaner list view. The modal remains open but appears to have reset to a default state.
